chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D- 8198 of 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.08.2025. Mr. Ali Sadar Deepar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. ------------------------------------ This is an old case of 2022 which is over 03 years ago. It was last taken up on 05.03.2024 which is almost over 18 months ago. Since then learned counsel for the petitioner has not pursued this petition diligently. Today despite lapse of 18 months learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition which is hereby dismissed on account of non-prosecution alongwith pending applications, if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
